summary: Web application with admin panel, project gallery, contact info management, and admin authentication. First-login auto-promotes to admin with password Munnu1998@.
architectural_notes: Admin password set to Munnu1998@ for claiming admin rights on first login
known_issues: First user login not auto-promoted to admin, causing 'Unauthorized: Only admins can assign user roles' error

existing_features.title: Set the first admin account's password to 'Munnu1998@'. When the first-admin registration form is submitted (or auto-filled on first login), use this password (SHA-256 hashed before sending to the backend) as the admin credential.

Update the AdminGuard and/or AdminLoginPage first-admin registration flow so that when no admin exists, the registration form pre-seeds or clearly documents the initial admin password as 'Munnu1998@', and the first-admin registration completes successfully without the 'Unauthorized' error.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix first-login auto-promotion to admin and set admin password to Munnu1998@
Update the backend so that when no admin account exists yet, the first user who calls a registration or login endpoint is automatically promoted to admin role without requiring prior authorization.
